summary: Tested Shifts feature end-to-end. Backend: 15/15 new pytest cases pass for /api/shifts CRUD, role-exclusivity, default-exclusivity, resolve endpoints, employee shift override (set + clear via empty string), and dynamic-shift half-day rules. Existing 23 unit tests in test_shift_rules.py & test_shift_rules_dict.py also pass (38/38 total). Frontend: Settings → Shifts tab loads, New Shift modal opens, role-conflict warning ('Currently in Field Shift — will move here on save') correctly appears when picking a role currently owned by another shift. Shift card create + delete works. Employee Edit modal exposes 'Shift Override' (data-testid=edit-shift_id) dropdown with options ['— Use role default —', 'Field Shift · 07:00 – 16:00', 'HO Shift · 09:30 – 18:30'] and current value blank for an employee with no override.
critical_code_review_comments: shifts.py /resolve/me: when no shift can be resolved (e.g. admin role with no employee_id and no default), endpoint returns null which is acceptable but consider returning explicit 204 or sentinel for clarity.

Field-agent role on Field Shift was lost during initial test_role_auto_removed_from_other_shift run — fixed by adding restoration logic in the session-scoped teardown fixture so seeded data is preserved across runs.
Soft-delete cascade behavior for employee.shift_id is correct ($unset on delete), but note that historical attendance records retaining shift_id+shift_name snapshot is preserved as designed.
ShiftsTab.js role conflict computation uses otherShifts list — works correctly. ATTENDANCE_ROLES list excludes hr_admin which is intentional.
seed_data_creation: Test fixture creates TEST_-prefixed transient shifts and tears them down after the session. Seeded 'Field Shift' and 'HO Shift' are preserved (verified post-run: Field Shift -> field_agent+managers, HO Shift -> management+employee+is_default=true).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Shifts feature fully verified. Backend CRUD endpoints validated: GET/POST/PUT/DELETE /api/shifts, GET /api/shifts/resolve/me, GET /api/shifts/resolve/{employee_id} (HR-only), and PUT /api/employees/{employee_id} with shift_id (set or '' to clear). Role-exclusivity and is_default-exclusivity work correctly via $pullAll and update_many. Dynamic shift half-day rules verified through compute_punch_in_status_with_shift / compute_status_after_punch_out_with_shift: 31min late -> half_day late_punch_in; within grace -> present; <min_full_day_hours -> half_day short_hours; late half_day stays half_day even with long hours. Frontend ShiftsTab + EmployeeEditForm shift_id integration confirmed via UI clicks and screenshots.
rca_of_the_issue: No bugs. One transient mutation observation: my role-exclusivity test moved 'field_agent' off the seeded 'Field Shift'; the test fixture now restores it on teardown so seed integrity is preserved across reruns.
